Hyperliquid explained.

Guides, News & more.

Hyperliquid.xyz is an easy-to-use decentralized exchange where you can trade any major cryptocurrency without signing up at a centralized exchange like Binance, Bybit and co. Start Crypto Trading now!

Hyperliquid.gg is your web portal to Hyperliquid - the new DeFi blockchain. Find free guides on how to buy the HYPE coin, other tokens and more. Stay tuned with the latest news of the Hyperliquid universe.

Buy HYPE Guide
Hyperliquid.xyz DEX
Hyper Foundation

What is Hyperliquid.xyz?

Hyperliquid.xyz is a popular decentralized exchange (DEX) built on the HyperLiquid blockchain—trade crypto assets with up to 50x leverage, no registration, and no KYC. Connect your wallet, deposit funds, and start trading instantly. Experience blazing-fast performance and true ownership with Hyperliquid.

What is Hyperliquid?

Hyperliquid is a high-performance blockchain platform that hosts various decentralized financial applications like exchanges or casinos. It provides near-instant order settlement and sub-second block times, enabling users to trade and create value securely without sacrificing speed. Eliminating slow confirmations and expensive fees paves the way for more complex, trustless applications to thrive.

Staking

Stake your tokens on Hyperliquid to earn passive rewards while supporting the network’s security and efficiency—no complicated steps or intermediaries. Simply connect your wallet, choose your staking pool, and watch your assets grow. Experience enhanced transparency and total control with Hyperliquid staking.

Vaults (Liquidity, Copytrading)

You can provide liquidity by investing in the official Hyperliquidity Provider (HLP). If you’d instead not trade yourself, deposit funds into vaults to automatically copy the vault founders’ actions, retaining complete control of your assets. Also, you can create your vault by entering a name and description, depositing at least 100 USDC, and maintaining more than 5% of total liquidity. As the vault leader, you’ll receive a 10% profit share.

About other coins on Hyperliquid

HYPE is the native token on Hyperliquid. However, there are plenty more UNIQUE tickers, with PURR being the most notable meme-cat. Many emerging tokens, including PEPE, FUN, and VEGAS, each bring a unique twist to the crypto space and offer entertainment value alongside potential utility. While meme-based tokens like PURR and PEPE often attract attention for their humorous themes and community-focused vibes, casino-centric coins like FUN and VEGAS cater to online gaming enthusiasts who appreciate convenient, fast, and secure transactions. Together, these diverse assets highlight Hyperliquid’s commitment to innovation and variety, ensuring users can find engagement whether they want to add a playful dimension to their investments or tap into exciting virtual casino experiences.
